meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.position: Frontend-Focused Full Stack Developer | React | Express | Node.js | MongoDB
meta.heroAbout: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer specialized in building highly interactive interfaces, database integrations, and serverless workflows.
meta.about: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building modern web applications and SaaS platforms using HTML, CSS, SCSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Experienced in developing full-stack applications with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Supabase, including AI-powered solutions.

achievements.title: Full-Stack Dev
achievements.description: Built scalable apps with Supabase & MongoDB.

impact: Developed responsive frontend interfaces for 17+ commercial SaaS, LMS, e-commerce, and administrative web applications.
Translated Figma designs into production-ready React applications and integrated REST APIs to deliver dynamic user experiences.
Built reusable React components, complex forms, state management, and data-fetching workflows for scalable web applications.
leadership: Owned frontend implementation for React-based commercial applications, delivering responsive interfaces and integrating REST APIs.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to implement features, resolve API integration challenges, and deliver production-ready user experiences.
responsibilities: Developed responsive React applications by translating Figma designs into reusable, production-ready user interfaces.
Integrated REST APIs and implemented React Context and React Query to manage application state and dynamic data.
Collaborated using Git and Agile workflows to deliver features, fix issues, and maintain high-quality frontend code.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Gaining a comprehensive foundation in computer science principles, algorithms, and modern software engineering practices. Actively applying theoretical concepts to real-world full-stack development and optimizing scalable applications.

certificates.title: Reactive Accelerator - Batch 4
certificates.info: Advanced React and Next.js program (93.56%) covering architecture, hooks, routing, state management, API integration, and Next.js App Router.
